items.title: RAKEZ
items.text: Use for company-formation, free-zone, licensing, and related entity-routing issues. A complaint brief should identify the company, license or file context, the rights affected, and the exact intervention sought.

items.title: UAE Ministry of Economy
items.text: Use for economy-facing company or commercial complaints where the complaint pathway or authority needs confirmation. Include company identifiers, chronology, and the statutory hook relied on.
items.source: Ministry of Economy official contact channels

items.title: UAE prosecution or competent cybercrime authority
items.text: Use only when the sealed record grounds an actual cybercrime or criminal complaint path. The referral should preserve the distinction between verified conduct and still-missing logs or attribution gaps.
items.source: Federal Decree-Law No. (34) of 2021 On Countering Rumors and Cybercrimes
